mapper.select: SELECT menu_top_id, menu_name, gender FROM nextjs_shop_menu_top

SELECT ms.menu_sub_id, ms.menu_name, COUNT(p.product_id) AS productCount FROM nextjs_shop_menu_sub ms LEFT JOIN nextjs_shop_product p ON p.menu_sub_id = ms.menu_sub_id AND p.sale_stop = 0 WHERE ms.menu_top_id = #{menuTopId} GROUP BY ms.menu_sub_id, ms.menu_name ORDER BY ms.menu_sub_id

SELECT p.product_id, p.name, p.origin_price, p.final_price, p.view_count, p.wish_count, f.file_path AS imgPath, f.copyright, f.copyright_url FROM nextjs_shop_product p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pi.product_id, pi.file_id FROM nextjs_shop_product_image pi INNER JOIN ( SELECT product_id, MIN(sort_key) AS min_sort_key FROM nextjs_shop_product_image WHERE is_thumbnail = 1 GROUP BY product_id ) min_pi ON pi.product_id = min_pi.product_id AND pi.sort_key = min_pi.min_sort_key WHERE pi.is_thumbnail = 1 ) tpi ON tpi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN nextjs_shop_file f ON f.file_id = tpi.file_id
LIMIT 10
